Portfolio

Design, making, and craft.

Three domains. One thread: precision in process, care in execution.

Design & Media

Lead Studio Director. Full Adobe suite. Motion graphics, color grading, logo design, broadcast production.

Maker

Woodworking, resin work, modular kinetic 3D art, and self-designed fabricated objects.

Resin Table

Handmade from raw materials. Designed, poured, and finished entirely by hand.

3D-Printed Spoiler Shelf

Self-designed, 3D-printed, and vinyl-wrapped. Form follows function — but also looks good.

Crochet

An unexpected craft — patience, repetition, and rhythm. Meditative in the same way markets are.

Culinary

Self-taught advanced cooking and pastry. Food as craft — documented at @brogan.bites.
